rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Another weird customer has been
coming around lately. This one's
a pretty woman, but still...

rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0002
rows.name:
She asks me to recommend girly clothes
and stuff, "to be pretty like me."
But I sell art! Not clothes!

rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0003
rows.name:
I told her I know little of clothes,
but she was already beautiful. She
said she wanted to be womanlier.

rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0004
rows.name:
It seems like there has to be a reason
behind it...but I'm not sure how
appropriate it is for me to ask.

rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0005
rows.name:
...No, come on, Sarah! I promised
myself I'd be better about
being honest with people!

rows.label: tlk70000014_04_msg0006
rows.name:
Maybe I'll talk to her more
next time. If she's nice,
I'll introduce her to you!
